title: Cirrhopetalum omerandrum
taxonomy: Cirrhopetalum omerandrum is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Coelogyneae. The genus Cirrhopetalum is part of the tribe Coelogyneae, which consists of terrestrial orchids with sympodial growth habits. The species is native to Asia, specifically in tropical regions. Cirrhopetalum omerandrum is further categorized under the subtribe Coelogyneinae.
